data.name: GirlFriend VR
data.detailed_description:
與您的女朋友無休止的性愛！無論何時何地，無論何時何地都與她發生性關係！
您可以在任何想要的地方移動並立即發生性關係。
您可以穿著各種角色扮演服裝打扮她，調整她的身體，並進行詳細的更改，例如化妝。
我們成功地創建了一個真實，生動的VR空間，使您感覺自己好像在那裡，獨自與女人在一起。
一定要享受這款色情VR遊戲，我們確保每個細節都非常適合您的內心！您一定能夠釋放負載！


《解釋功能》
無論何時何地，您都可以在任何地方進行性行為。
您可以通過觸摸某個點來移動女人。
當您用嘴或手觸摸她的嘴或褲rot時，女人會做出反應。
您可以切換鏡子，背景和其他方面。

・打電話給她到沙發，床，浴室，洗手間或其他任何您想要的地方！
・從事各種性行為，例如自慰，發作，灌溉，讓她成為頂峰！


＜大量的角色扮演，身體，化妝和其他選擇
您可以更換她的衣服，衣服層，胸圍尺寸，棕褐色，髮型，配飾，彩色觸點，口紅，指甲和其他方面。


＜完全裸體模式，皮膚感覺柔軟＞
・完全裸露時，她的皮膚會切換，使其具有柔軟的感覺，即使她的呼吸也會變得生動。


＜收集了許多性行為＞
・自慰，手槍，雜迪奧，irrumatio，宣教士，頂部的女人和狗狗風格
・完整的動畫，具有原始聲音表演，並且可以切換或循環每個場景


＜預防措施
*如果身體卡住，請按壁櫥頂部附近的按鈕
*動作可能會根據您正在播放的PC的規格或HMD環境等因素而滯後。
*所有出現在這款遊戲中的角色均年滿18歲。


《控制》
＜控制器動作＞
・選擇並決定使用食指觸發器
・使用中指扳機抓住或放開
・使用左操縱桿移動
・使用正確的操縱桿更改方向

＜智能手錶動作調整她的目光＞
使用左手上的智能手錶更改高度
當不必要的情況下，您可以擺脫UI顯示器，並在需要時進行調整


這項工作的角色模型使用THW銷售的原始3D頭像“Kuronatu”。
銷售站點鏈接：

data.short_description: 您想在VR中與您可愛的女友發生性關係嗎？無論何時何時何地穿任何東西。這是你的選擇！ 對自己的角質女友做任何您想做的事。享受一個只有你們兩個的世界而不會被任何人打擾。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® i5-4590 or AMD FX 8350 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce® GTX 970 or AMD Radeon™ R9 290 equivalent or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: GirlFriend VR
data.detailed_description:
Endless sex with your girlfriend! Have all kinds of sex with her whenever, wherever!
You can move wherever you want and have sex immediately.
You can dress her up in various cosplay costumes, adjust her body, and make detailed changes, such as to her makeup.
We have succeeded in creating a real, vivid VR space that makes you feel as if you are actually there, alone with a woman.
By all means, please enjoy this erotic VR game, which we made sure every detail is perfect for, to your heart's content! You are sure to be able to let off a load!


《Explanation of Features》
You can play through sex acts whenever, wherever.
You can move the woman by touching a certain point.
The woman will react when you touch her mouth or crotch with your mouth or hands.
You can toggle mirrors, backgrounds, and other aspects on or off.

・Call her to the couch, bed, bath, restroom, or wherever else you want!
・Engage in all sorts of sex acts, such as masturbating, fellatio, irrumatio, and letting her get on top!


＜Wealth of Cosplay, Body, Makeup, and Other Options＞
You can change her outfit, clothing layers, bust size, tan, hairstyle, accessories, colored contacts, lipstick, nails, and other aspects.


＜Fully Nude Mode with Skin That Feels Supple＞
・When fully nude, her skin switches so that it has a supple feel to the touch, and even her breathing will feel vivid.


＜Collection of Numerous Sex Acts＞
・Masturbating, handjob, fellatio, irrumatio, missionary, woman on top, and doggystyle
・Full animation with original voice acting, and it is possible to switch or loop each scene


＜Precautions＞
*If the body gets stuck, press the button near the top of the closet
*Motions may become lagged depending on factors such as the specs of the PC you are playing on or the HMD environment
*All characters who appear in this game are 18 years of age or older.


《Controls》
＜Controller Actions＞
・Select and decide using the index finger trigger
・Grab or let go using the middle finger trigger
・Move using the left joystick
・Change direction using the right joystick

＜Smartwatch Actions to Adjust Her Gaze＞
Change the height using the smartwatch on your left hand
You can get rid of the UI display when it is unnecessary and make adjustments when needed


The character model of this work uses the original 3D avatar ""KURONATU"" sold by thw.
Sales site link:
Twitter link of author thw (@thw_VRC):

data.short_description: Would you like to have sex with your cute girlfriend in VR? Wherever, whenever, and wearing whatever. It's your choice! Do whatever you want to your own horny girlfriend. Enjoy a world with only the two of you in it without being bothered by anybody.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64bit)
  • Processor: Intel® i5-4590 or AMD FX 8350 or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce® GTX 970 or AMD Radeon™ R9 290 equivalent or better
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • VR Support: SteamVR
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
